decisions.what: Implemented Pinecone client with connection management
decisions.why: Provides singleton pattern for efficient connection pooling and reuse across the application

decisions.what: Created comprehensive Pydantic models for vector operations
decisions.why: Ensures type safety and validation for all vector database interactions

decisions.what: Implemented mock embedding service with deterministic hashing
decisions.why: Allows testing without external API dependencies while maintaining consistent behavior
Reduces redundant API calls and improves performance for repeated embedding generation

decisions.what: Implemented vector query service with metadata filtering
decisions.why: Enables multi-tenant isolation and fine-grained access control through owner_id filtering
Core feature for AI-powered synergy calculations and entity matching
Simplifies initial deployment and index configuration for different environments

decisions.what: Comprehensive test suite with 30+ test cases
decisions.why: Ensures reliability and catches regressions across all vector database operations

decisions.what: Used multi-stage Dockerfile with builder and runtime stages
decisions.why: Optimizes image size by separating build dependencies from runtime, following the specification requirements for production-grade containerization
Security best practice to run containers as non-root user, preventing potential privilege escalation

decisions.what: Implemented comprehensive docker-entrypoint.sh script with database migration handling
decisions.why: Ensures database is ready and migrations are applied before application starts, with proper error handling and logging

decisions.what: Separated development and test Docker Compose configurations
decisions.why: Allows different configurations for local development vs testing, with test environment using tmpfs for database to improve performance

decisions.what: Included health check instructions in Dockerfile and docker-compose files
decisions.why: Enables container orchestrators to monitor application health and restart unhealthy containers automatically

decisions.what: Used PostgreSQL 16 Alpine image for database service
decisions.why: Provides lightweight, production-ready PostgreSQL with minimal attack surface

decisions.what: Created integration tests for Docker functionality
decisions.why: Verifies container startup, health checks, environment variable loading, and service connectivity
